description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story brick apartment building with a flat, concrete roof and visible weathering. The exterior walls are constructed from red bricks, with patches of green moss and climbing vines adding an aged, slightly neglected appearance. Small, square windows with dark frames are symmetrically placed on each floor, and a single green door serves as the main entrance. The building features a prominent horizontal ledge separating the two floors, and the roof is bordered by a raised concrete parapet. The overall structure is simple and utilitarian, with no balconies or decorative elements, reflecting a practical architectural style. The building's surfaces are rough and matte, with visible textural details from the brickwork and plant growth.
description: A two-story red brick apartment building with a flat concrete roof, small square windows, and visible moss and vines on the exterior. The structure is simple, with a single green entrance door and no balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing two floors, three small square windows, and extensive moss and vine growth on the brick facade.
description_view_1: Side view with one window on the upper floor and the main green entrance door below, plus some vine growth.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single window on each floor and moderate vine coverage, no entrance visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no windows or doors, but significant moss and vine spread on the brick wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in single rows on each floor, with even spacing and alignment both vertically and horizontally.
